title: DDI-CDI Value Domain
description: Unified DDI-CDI ValueDomain building block covering both SubstantiveValueDomain (subject-matter values) and SentinelValueDomain (processing/missing-value codes). Both inherit from ValueDomain. SentinelValueDomain adds an optional cdi:platformType property. Supports described domains (ValueAndConceptDescription), enumerated domains (EnumerationDomain), and conceptual domain references.

anyOf.description: Single ValueDomain node

@type.description: Must include either cdi:SubstantiveValueDomain or cdi:SentinelValueDomain

@id.description: Identifier for this value domain node

cdi:catalogDetails.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:catalogDetails.description: Administrative catalog metadata for this value domain

anyOf.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
anyOf.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

items.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
items.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:identifier.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:identifier.description: Formal identifier for this value domain

cdi:recommendedDataType.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:recommendedDataType.description: Recommended physical data type for values in this domain

cdi:isDescribedBy.description: Description of the value domain constraints (0..1). Inline ValueAndConceptDescription or @id reference.

anyOf.description: DDI-CDI description of value constraints and measurement level (cls-ValueAndConceptDescription)

cdi:description.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:description.description: Textual description of the value domain constraints

cdi:maximumValueExclusive.description: Exclusive upper bound for valid values

cdi:maximumValueInclusive.description: Inclusive upper bound for valid values

cdi:minimumValueExclusive.description: Exclusive lower bound for valid values

cdi:minimumValueInclusive.description: Inclusive lower bound for valid values

cdi:regularExpression.description: Regular expression constraining valid value syntax

cdi:typeOfContent.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:typeOfContent.description: Type or format of the content

anyOf.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:takesValuesFrom.description: Enumeration domain providing the set of permissible coded values (0..1). Inline EnumerationDomain or @id reference.

anyOf.description: DDI-CDI enumeration domain providing a set of permissible coded values (cls-EnumerationDomain)

@id.description: Identifier for this enumeration domain node

cdi:name.description: Structured name for this enumeration domain

anyOf.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

items.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:uses.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:uses.description: Reference to a LevelStructure that organizes the enumeration. @id reference only.

cdi:isDefinedBy.description: References to Concepts that define the enumerated values. Array of @id references.

items.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
items.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:references.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:references.description: Reference to the CategorySet providing the value categories. @id reference only.

anyOf.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
anyOf.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:takesConceptsFrom.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:takesConceptsFrom.description: Reference to a conceptual domain (SubstantiveConceptualDomain or SentinelConceptualDomain) that provides conceptual grounding for this value domain (0..1). @id reference only.

cdi:platformType.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:platformType.description: (SentinelValueDomain only) The type of software platform under which sentinel codes will be used. Statistical software platforms use different sets of codes to indicate missing values. Example values: SASNumeric, SPSSstyle, Rstyle, StataNumeric, BlankString, EmptyString, Unrestricted.
